prompt: A close-up of a vintage camera resting on a wooden table, surrounded by film rolls and photographs.
prompt_refined: A sharp close-up, photorealistic image of a classic vintage camera, well-preserved, resting centrally on a rustic wooden table with distinct grain. Several film rolls are loosely scattered to the left and in front of the camera, while a small stack of old, sepia-toned photographs are placed to its right, with some prints partially overlapping.
objects: film rolls (scattered to the left and in front of the camera)
small stack of old, sepia-toned photographs (placed to the right of the camera, with some prints partially overlapping)
